message: Node started: Test if there exists an n such that k(n) = 1. This occurs if 2023*n = 2^p for some p. Test if there exists an n such that k(n) = 2. This occurs if 2023*n = 2^a + 2^b for some a, b. Test if there exists an n such that k(n) = 3. This occurs if 2023*n = 2^a + 2^b + 2^c. Use modular arithmetic (mod 2023) to check if these forms are possible for any integers a, b, c.
